title: blepharis glinus
intro: Blepharis glinus, also known as African Blue Fleabane, is a perennial plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blepharis glinus include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as having anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Blepharis glinus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, or used in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
